plan.annotation: Measured Convex adapter run; receipt payload 1160 bytes. Latency is measured, not zero, and not production-proven.

operations.label: TypeScript contract
operations.value: interface CaseflowAdapter { stage(input: StageInput): Promise<Proposal>; commit(input: CommitInput): Promise<Receipt>; restore(versionId: string): Promise<Receipt>; }

operations.label: Convex benchmark
operations.value: p50 38 milliseconds · p95 92 milliseconds · receipt 1160 bytes

operations.label: Commit to receipt bytes
operations.value: commit returns Receipt; measured receipt 1160 bytes at p50 38 milliseconds and p95 92 milliseconds

plan.takeaway: The TypeScript contract returns a Receipt on commit, and the Convex adapter measured p50 38 milliseconds and p95 92 milliseconds.
plan.title: Caseflow Adapter: Contract Meets Measured Runtime
